2000.reason: [The currentLineNum may not correspond to the line of the last non-terminal before the missing semicolon. According to the specification, the error line number should be the line where the last non-terminal (like Exp, LVal, etc.) before the semicolon is located, but currentLineNum reflects the current token's line which could be after the actual error location.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [The currentLineNum may not correspond to the line of the last non-terminal before the missing semicolon. According to the specification, the error line number should be the line where the last non-terminal (like Exp, LVal, etc.) before the semicolon is located, but currentLineNum reflects the current token's line which could be after the actual error location.]

2017.reason: [Same issue: currentLineNum doesn't necessarily represent the line of the last non-terminal (Exp) before the missing semicolon. The error line should be the line number of the Exp token, not the current token which might be a different statement or block ending.]
